<style>
  .np-heart{
  width:42px; height:42px;
  display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
  border-radius:14px;
  background: #ffe4e6;         /* light red/pink */
  color: #ff3b30;              /* accent red */
  font-size:22px;
  box-shadow: 0 10px 20px rgba(255,59,48,0.18);
  animation: npBeat 1.2s infinite;
}
@keyframes npBeat{
  0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
  20% { transform: scale(1.08); }
  40% { transform: scale(1.00); }
  60% { transform: scale(1.10); }
}
  /* ===== Background overall ===== */
  .nr-dashboard-theme md-content {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #fdecef 0%, #f7f7fb 45%, #ffffff 100%) !important;
  }

  /* Make dashboard centered like an app (good on PC) */
  .nr-dashboard-theme ui-view>md-content>div,
  .nr-dashboard-theme .grid-stack {
    max-width: 420px;
    /* mobile-app width */
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  /* ===== Top bar ===== */
  .nr-dashboard-theme md-toolbar {
    background: transparent !important;
    color: #111827 !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
  }

  .nr-dashboard-theme md-toolbar .md-toolbar-tools {
    font-weight: 800;
  }

  /* ===== Cards (groups/widgets) ===== */
  .nr-dashboard-theme md-card,
  .nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardpanel {
    border-radius: 22px !important;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.92) !important;
    border: 1px solid rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.06) !important;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 25px rgba(17, 24, 39, 0.08) !important;
  }

  /* Group title */
  .nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardtitle,
  .nr-dashboard-theme .md-title {
    color: #111827 !important;
    font-weight: 900 !important;
    letter-spacing: 0.2px;
  }

  /* ===== Buttons (pill style) ===== */
  .nr-dashboard-theme .md-button {
    border-radius: 999px !important;
    text-transform: none !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
  }

  /* ===== Inputs ===== */
  .nr-dashboard-theme input,
  .nr-dashboard-theme textarea {
    border-radius: 14px !important;
  }

  /* ===== Make gauges look cleaner ===== */
  .nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-gauge text {
    font-weight: 800 !important;
  }

  /* Optional: reduce chart grid harshness */
  .nr-dashboard-theme canvas {
    filter: saturate(1.05);
  }
</style>
